rule_metadata.name: XYPayload
rule_metadata.description: Identifier for payloads using XXXXYYYY/YYYYXXXX markers
rule_metadata.author: Seth Hardy

rules.rule_text:
rule XYPayload : Payload
{
	meta:
		description = "Identifier for payloads using XXXXYYYY/YYYYXXXX markers"
		author = "Seth Hardy"
		last_modified = "2014-05-05"

	strings:
		$start_marker = "XXXXYYYY"
		$end_marker = "YYYYXXXX"

	condition:
		$start_marker and $end_marker
}
